nasb.text: He shall offer what he can afford, the one for a sin offering and the other for a burnt offering, together with the grain offering. So the priest shall make atonement before the Lord on behalf of the one to be cleansed.

esv.text: one for a sin offering and the other for a burnt offering, along with a grain offering. And the priest shall make atonement before the Lord for him who is being cleansed.

cnv.text: 他要按著自己的經濟能力，獻上一隻作贖罪祭，一隻作燔祭，連同素祭一同獻上。祭司要在耶和華面前，為求潔淨的人贖罪。

ccb.text: 一只作赎罪祭，一只作燔祭。这样，祭司在耶和华面前为他赎了罪。
